Charact. 2015, 107, 293. ![](images/afc2b8cb7ce9dae644ff9f3dd0dd16d8a8516691107028a296a3335e691ae194.jpg) <details> <summary>natural_image</summary> Portrait photo of a woman with short dark hair wearing a floral-patterned top (no text or symbols visible) </details> Hu Shufen is an associate professor and master supervisor at the Department of Mechanical Design and Manufacturing, Jiangxi Agricultural University, Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, China. Her main research directions are material science and processing engineering. ![](images/691c684314bd3d487ee0cb8731448f568c5ebe9186dc896e31e0449951ad6cc4.jpg) <details> <summary>natural_image</summary> Portrait photo of a young man wearing a blue collared shirt (no text or symbols visible) </details> Yang Haokun is a senior consultant and a doctor of material science and engineering at Smart and Manufacturing Division, Hong Kong Productivity Council, Hong Kong SAR, China. His current research interests include fabrication technology and mechanical properties of high-performance metallic materials and their composites.
